Perf Check: Response < 500ms; PA-API cached 1h; no timeout on slow Amazon response
Security Check: Amazon PA-API credentials in env vars only; ASIN validated (10-char alphanumeric); rate limiting (PA-API has strict quota); no credentials in response body
Content Check: Product data accurate (name/price/image/rating); affiliate tag appended correctly; INR pricing
Functional Check: Valid ASIN returns product data; invalid ASIN returns 404; Amazon API error handled gracefully; affiliate tag present in response URL
Notes: Amazon PA-API has strict rate limits — verify quota handling and backoff strategy; confirm associate tag is correct

Perf Check: Response < 800ms; PA-API search cached 30min; paginated results
Security Check: Search query sanitized; PA-API credentials in env only; rate limiting; no SSRF via query param; no credentials in response
Content Check: Search results relevant; affiliate tag on all product links; sponsored results labeled; no fake products
Functional Check: Search returns products for valid query; empty query returns 400; Amazon API error handled gracefully; affiliate tag on all results
Notes: Verify affiliate tag appended to every product URL in response — missing tag = lost commission
